title: fumaria bulbosa subsp. cava
intro: Fumaria bulbosa subsp. cava, also known as the fumitory or earth smoke, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family (Fumariaceae) that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Fumaria bulbosa subsp. cava include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
